message: Phase 1-5: Special Lead Intake Queue Implementation
feat: unmissable full-width inbound call banner on every page
fix: inbound calls ring browser instantly — never blocked by slow DB
fix: communications stack hardening — 12 bug fixes across dialer, SMS, voice
feat: SMS thread creation endpoint for website Text Us form
fix: exclude tina from eslint (built by Codex), add SMS webhook setup endpoint
feat: SMS webhook setup endpoint + SMS fields in disconnect-phone diagnostic
fix: inbound calls bypass Vapi — ring Logan directly, fix caller ID
fix: inbound call answer — attach event listeners, blocking claim, status polling
fix: remaining review issues — queue audit trail, after-hours guards, UI fixes
fix: four critical bugs in incoming call + jeff messages handling
feat: persistent Jeff messages panel with full history
feat: unlimited dial queue + red X remove + scrollable lists
feat: after-hours voicemail mode + incoming call popup + auto-open client file
fix: polish regular queue dialer — phoneIndex resets, better toasts
fix: regular queue dialer stays on lead after call — no auto-advance
fix: bypass Inngest for bulk-bricked — process inline with batching
fix: add CRON_SECRET auth to bulk-bricked endpoint for easy triggering
fix: persist Bricked AI data across page reloads + add bulk analysis endpoint
feat: infer distress tags from import list name
feat: add jeff-auto-redial cron — fires Jeff on due auto-cycle phones every 2 min
[cursor] Dialer: style Add To Auto Cycle link emerald green
fix: remove serverUrl and transferPlan rejected by Vapi API
fix: surface Vapi errors in toast instead of silently swallowing them
fix: bypass Inngest for outbound batch — call Vapi directly
